---
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    css: ["default", "extra.css"]
    lib_dir: libs
    seal: false
    nature:
      highlightStyle: github
      highlightLines: true
      countIncrementalSlides: false
      ratio: '16:9'
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
##xaringan::inf_mr()
## For offline work: https://bookdown.org/yihui/rmarkdown/some-tips.html#working-offline
## Images not appearing? Put images folder inside the libs folder as that is the main data directory

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(stargazer)
##library(kableExtra)
##library(modelr)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE,
                      eval = TRUE,
                      error = FALSE,
                      message = FALSE,
                      warning = FALSE,
                      comment = NA)
```

class: slideblue

.size80[**Today's Agenda**]

<br>

.size50[

Introduction to political violence

]

<br>
<br>

.center[.size40[
  Justin Leinaweaver (Fall 2021)
]]



---

class: middle
background-image: url('libs/Images/background-blue_triangles.jpg')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center

.pull-left[

<br>

<br>

<br>

<br>

.size60[**Introductions**]

]

.pull-right[
.size50[

1. Name

2. Year in school

3. Major

4. Example?

]]



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-space1.jpg')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center

class: middle

.textwhite[.size50[**LO1: Methods Knowledge**]

.size40[Students should demonstrate an ability to use statistical software (e.g. Excel, R, SPSS, etc) to organize, explore and visualize data in order to answer important political science questions.]
]



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-granite.jpg')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center

class: middle

.textwhite[.size50[**LO1: Methods Knowledge**]

.size40[Students should demonstrate an ability to use statistical software (e.g. Excel, R, SPSS, etc) to organize, explore and visualize data in order to answer important political science questions.]
]



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-crumpled_black_paper.jpg')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center

class: middle

.textwhite[.size50[**LO1: Methods Knowledge**]

.size40[Students should demonstrate an ability to use statistical software (e.g. Excel, R, SPSS, etc) to organize, explore and visualize data in order to answer important political science questions.]
]



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-forest.png')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center

class: middle

.size50[**LO1: Methods Knowledge**]

.size40[Students should demonstrate an ability to use statistical software (e.g. Excel, R, SPSS, etc) to organize, explore and visualize data in order to answer important political science questions.]



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-watercolor.jpg')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center

class: middle

.size50[**LO1: Methods Knowledge**]

.size40[Students should demonstrate an ability to use statistical software (e.g. Excel, R, SPSS, etc) to organize, explore and visualize data in order to answer important political science questions.]





---

.size30[**LO1: Methods Knowledge**]

.size30[Students should demonstrate an ability to use statistical software (e.g. Excel, R, SPSS, etc) to organize, explore and visualize data in order to answer important political science questions.]

<br>

--

.size30[**LO2: Critical Thinking & Problem Solving Skills**]

.size30[Students should demonstrate an understanding of how research design impacts our confidence in the claims made by researchers, politicians and the media.]

<br>

--

.size30[**LO3: Communication Skills**]

.size30[Students should demonstrate effective written and data visualization skills.]



---

class: middle

.size60[**Course Grade**]

<br>

.size30[
||Proportion|
|:-----|:----:|
|Participation|50%|
|Assignments|50%|
|||
|Examples:||
|- Analyze a data project: Regime type||
|- Analyze a data project: International outcome||
|- Complete a research report||
|- Present a Research Finding||

]

???

Course Grade

Heavy on the participation.

You guys will steer us this semester. You pick the projects and I'll keep you moving forward.



---

class: middle, slideblue

.size60[**Participation**]

.size40[
1. Get to class on time,

2. Have the materials you need to be productive,

3. Do the work in class, and

4. Save your work (annotated code and data).
]



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/01_1-office_space.jpg')
background-size: 68%
background-position: center

???

Excused absence coming up?

Complete a make-up assignment to earn your participation.



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/01_1-coyote.jpg')
background-size: 84%
class: center, bottom

???

The Attendance Cliff



---

class: middle, slidepurple

.size60[**For Thursday**]

.size50[
1. Install R and RStudio on your computer (bring your laptop to class), 

2. Review the options for our first data project (be ready to vote)

3. Bring snacks!
]
